{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Fisher Goldsign
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Fisher Goldsign]] is a web of [[madra]] between the fingers that creates webbed fingers.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
